eckhardt-sarah.text: No public data in our set ties Sarah Eckhardt's background, votes, or stated positions to property taxes or public school funding.

As of 2026-02-21, Sarah Eckhardt's campaign had raised $57,884, per Texas Ethics Commission filings (this filing period only, not a cycle-to-date total) -- fundraising scale only, not a stance on property taxes or public school funding.

huffines-don.text: No public data in our set ties Don Huffines's background, votes, or stated positions to property taxes or public school funding.

As of 2026-02-21, Don Huffines's campaign had raised $1,327,355, per Texas Ethics Commission filings (this filing period only, not a cycle-to-date total) -- fundraising scale only, not a stance on property taxes or public school funding.

caveats: We only show a connection to homeowner parent concerns when a candidate's own recorded background in our data set names it directly (for example, a farming or small-business background). Where no such record exists, we say so rather than guess at a candidate's likely position.

now.text: No recorded evidence in our set to project from for Sarah Eckhardt on property taxes or public school funding.
No recorded evidence in our set to project from for Don Huffines on property taxes or public school funding.

summary: For a homeowner parent voter looking at the Texas Comptroller of Public Accounts race (Don Huffines, Sarah Eckhardt): our data set does not contain candidate-specific positions or voting records on property taxes or public school funding for this race. Below is what we do have on each candidate's background and, where available, campaign finance.
